implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: Implements HTTP GET to JSONPlaceholder, parses response, constructs CSV headers/rows, and writes CSV to persistent storage. Does NOT implement filtering for location 'Boone' and writes CSV even if response array is empty.
implementation.name: main
implementation.pseudo_code:
FUNCTION main:
    SEND HTTP GET request to USERS_URL
    IF response not OK: THROW error
    PARSE JSON into users array
    DEFINE headers list
    MAP users to CSV rows using userToRow
    JOIN headers and rows into CSV string
    CREATE data directory if missing
    WRITE CSV string to CSV_PATH
    LOG saved message

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: Converts a single User object into a CSV row string array. Ensures all required fields from the API user object are included.
implementation.name: userToRow
implementation.pseudo_code:
FUNCTION userToRow(u):
    RETURN array of stringified user fields
    APPLY escapeCsvField to textual fields

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: Escapes CSV fields with commas, quotes, or newlines. Supports proper CSV formatting.
implementation.name: escapeCsvField
implementation.pseudo_code:
FUNCTION escapeCsvField(value):
    CONVERT value to string
    IF string contains ',', '"', or '\n':
        RETURN quoted version with escaped quotes
    ELSE RETURN string

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: Exposes saved CSV data through an HTTP API endpoint. Loads CSV, converts it to JSON using csvToJson, and returns it.
implementation.name: GET /api/users
implementation.pseudo_code:
ENDPOINT GET /api/users:
    IF CSV file missing: RETURN 404
    READ CSV file
    PARSE CSV to JSON array
    RETURN JSON array

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: Parses saved CSV back into JSON objects for exposure through GET /api/users.
implementation.name: csvToJson
implementation.pseudo_code:
FUNCTION csvToJson(csv):
    SPLIT csv into lines and filter empty
    IF fewer than 2 lines: RETURN empty array
    PARSE header line
    FOR each remaining line:
        PARSE values
        BUILD object mapping headers→values
    RETURN array of objects

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: Low-level CSV parsing utility used by csvToJson.
implementation.name: parseCsvLine
implementation.pseudo_code:
FUNCTION parseCsvLine(line):
    ITERATE chars handling quoted/unquoted segments
    SPLIT fields respecting CSV quote rules
    RETURN array of parsed fields

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: No function exists in repository. Location filtering is not implemented anywhere.
implementation.name: filterUsersByLocation

missing_implementations: before saving information check filter for data with location as Boone
If the API request fails or the response is empty, the system does not create or modify the CSV file and signals an error.
